title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Walmart India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Walmart India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!
